Professional Lawn Care

Services That Keep the Upstate Green

Every service tailored to your property, your grass type and your schedule. No cookie-cutter plans — just expert care that shows.

Lawn Mowing

Our precision mowing service goes beyond cutting grass. We adjust mower height to match your grass type and the season, alternate mowing patterns to prevent soil compaction, and leave your lawn with clean, professional striping.

  • Height-adjusted cuts for grass health
  • Alternating patterns prevent ruts
  • Weekly or bi-weekly scheduling
  • Professional-grade equipment

Edging & Blowing

Crisp, defined edges make the difference between a mowed lawn and a manicured property. We edge every driveway, sidewalk, patio and flower bed — then blow clean so not a single clipping is left behind.

  • Every hardscape edge defined
  • Complete clipping cleanup
  • Flower bed separation
  • Included with mowing packages

Hedge Trimming

Overgrown hedges drag down your entire property's look. Our crew shapes boxwoods, privet, holly and ornamental shrubs with precision — promoting dense, healthy growth and sharp sight lines.

  • Expert shaping for all hedge types
  • Promotes dense, healthy growth
  • Seasonal timing for best results
  • Debris cleared on-site

Debris Removal

Storms, wind and seasons leave behind branches, leaves and clutter. We clear everything — from light leaf pickup to heavy storm cleanup — so your property stays safe, clean and ready to enjoy.

  • Post-storm rapid response
  • Leaf and branch removal
  • Hauling included in service
  • Prevents pest and mold buildup

Weed Treatment

Weeds steal water, nutrients and sunlight from your lawn. Our targeted treatments eliminate existing weeds and prevent new growth — keeping your grass thick, green and competition-free.

  • Pre-emergent and post-emergent
  • Safe for grass and pets
  • Seasonal treatment schedule
  • Visible results within weeks
Packages

Choose Your Level of Care

Every package is customizable. Contact us for a personalized quote based on your property size and needs.

Weekly Service

52 visits a year. Our crew delivers tailored landscape services every single week.

  • 52 visits per year
  • Tailored landscape services
  • Consistent weekly schedule
  • Year-round coverage

Most Popular

Year Round

We offer both weekly and biweekly year round service tailored to your landscape needs.

  • Weekly service during growing season
  • Bi-weekly during non-growing season
  • Full year coverage
  • Tailored to your property

Bi-Weekly Service

26 visits a year. Our crew delivers tailored landscape services every other week.

  • 26 visits per year
  • Bi-weekly during growing season
  • Monthly during non-growing season
  • 19 visits per year option available

Seasonal

Only need us seasonally? We offer weekly and biweekly service during the growing season.

  • Growing season only
  • Weekly or bi-weekly options
  • Spring through fall coverage
  • Flexible scheduling
